speaker: MATT
raw_text: 8d6. Keyleth, I need you to roll a d20 minus one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Marisha. I would like you to roll for a gore attack against Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is ridiculous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do I add? I don't have a stat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18? No, I don't think that hits you. So you go ahead and try and gore Grog, and Grog ducks right beneath the two giant ivory horns.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I knock down the doorway a little bit more?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 20 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With that, as you duck below, the elephant slams through the archway, sending stone and pieces of wood flying, and stumbles past. You duck down to try and the avoid the attack, going underneath the elephant as it begins to stomp over you into the room. You see this as you spin around. The elephant bursts in, and it is very much an elephant, you can see now, with Percy on top being dragged through the rubble.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm thankfully wearing a helmet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's got Percival!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Roll off! Roll off, Percy!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (deadpan) Oh help. Help, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's so weak he can barely speak!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We must kill this elephant.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We must destroy this beast!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan and Grog, what are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We got to kill this thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you go. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will throw a Wand of Fireballs at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How many charges does it have left?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, plenty. I have only used one of seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But each time you use it-- okay. Not quite how it works, I don't think.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just look at the shirt, Matt, just look at his shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're right. One charge is a third level spell, I misunderstood. So you launch your Fireball, go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, what is the damage? It's 8d6. Got it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Percy, I need you to roll a dexterity saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus eight.
